school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: 87% goes with exactly two of Boyd, Library, and Period 5.

If Frost does not go with 87%, then both Period 4 goes with Greenhouse and 87% goes with Period 4.

The class with 82%'s period is higher than both Dunn's period and the class in the Cloister's period.
Either 87% goes with Workshop or Period 4 goes with 97%.
Hale goes with at least two of Studio, 97%, and Period 4.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.

Nadia goes with at least two of Sicilian, 2107, and 2nd.
